government work and not under copyright protection in the U.S.; foreign copyright protection may apply 2021 Abstract In 2020, the BeiDou navigation satellite system (BDS) initiated a real-time service (RTS) for precise point positioning (PPP) using the B2b signal for users in China and its surrounding areas.
